entry.content: • Updated macOS Python Virtualenv for the gcloud CLI to 3.14.5 with pyOpenSSL 26.0.0 and cryptography 46.0.7.
entry.summary: The gcloud CLI has been updated with new versions of Python, pyOpenSSL, and cryptography. This update ensures the CLI is running with the latest security patches and performance improvements.
entry.title: Google Cloud CLI: gcloud CLI updates

entry.content: • Fixed gcloud ai endpoints deploy-model to honor --machine-type for Gemini on GDC connected deployments. Previously the flag was silently ignored.
entry.summary: A recent update corrects an issue where the `--machine-type` flag was ignored during AI model deployments for Gemini on GDC connected deployments. This fix ensures the specified machine type is now correctly applied, improving deployment control and resource allocation.
entry.title: AI: AI model deployment fix

entry.content:
• Updated the Java SDK to version 5.0.3 build from the open source project https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/releases/tag/v5.0.3.
  • Fixed for https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/issues/503.
entry.summary: The Java SDK for App Engine has been updated to version 5.0.3, incorporating the latest changes from the open-source project. This update also includes a fix for issue 503.
entry.title: App Engine: App Engine Java SDK Updated

entry.content: • Added validation to enforce required sub-fields within arguments for releases, unit-kinds, and unit-operations commands.
entry.summary: App Lifecycle Manager now includes validation for required sub-fields in release, unit-kind, and unit-operation commands. This ensures data integrity and improves command usability.
entry.title: App Lifecycle Manager: App Lifecycle Manager Updates

entry.content: • Modified --group-key flag of gcloud access-context-manager cloud-bindings create to be optional.
entry.summary: The `--group-key` flag for creating cloud bindings in Access Context Manager is now optional. This change provides more flexibility when configuring access policies.
entry.title: Cloud Access Context Manager: Cloud Access Context Manager group key update

entry.content: • Remove deprecated from Extended Attributes parameters. Extended Attributes are marked as restricted.
entry.summary: Deprecated parameters have been removed from Extended Attributes, and these attributes are now marked as restricted. This change enhances security and simplifies attribute management.
entry.title: Cloud IAM: Extended Attributes Update

entry.content: • Added gcloud beta workstations update command to update a workstation's properties, such as its persistent directory disk size.
entry.summary: You can now update workstation properties, including persistent directory disk size, using the `gcloud beta workstations update` command. This allows for more flexible management of your development environments.
entry.title: Cloud Workstations: Update Cloud Workstations properties

entry.content: • Added support for updating Slurm prolog, epilog, task prolog, and task epilog scripts.
entry.summary: Cluster Director now supports updating Slurm prolog, epilog, task prolog, and task epilog scripts. This enhancement allows for more flexible and dynamic management of your Slurm workload execution.
entry.title: Cluster Director: Update Slurm Scripts

entry.content:
• Added EXTERNAL_PASSTHROUGH option to --load-balancing-scheme flag of gcloud compute forwarding-rules in beta.
  • Promoted --ip_addresses flag of gcloud compute forwarding-rules to beta.
  • Added EXTERNAL_PASSTHROUGH option to --load-balancing-scheme flag of gcloud compute backend-services in beta.
  • Added folder share support to gcloud compute reservations update.
  • Promoted --ncc-gateway flag to GA.
entry.summary: New options for forwarding rules and backend services are now available in beta, including external passthrough load balancing. Folder share support has been added to reservations, and the NCC gateway flag is now generally available.
entry.title: Compute Engine: Compute Engine Updates

entry.content:
• Added support for seeding a conversion workspace from a Cloud Storage bucket via --gcs-path flag in gcloud database-migration conversion-workspaces seed.
  • Added --dry-run flag to gcloud database-migration conversion-workspaces apply to allow validation of apply process by applying the draft version to a copy of the destination database.
  • Decoupled --host and --port requirements in gcloud database-migration connection-profiles create postgresql for destination connection profiles leveraging Cloud SQL or AlloyDB.
entry.summary: New features for database migration include seeding from Cloud Storage, dry-run validation for applying changes, and more flexible connection profile creation for PostgreSQL, especially when using Cloud SQL or AlloyDB.
entry.title: Database Migration: Database Migration Enhancements

entry.content:
• Added --maintenance-window-duration flag to gcloud container clusters create command as an alternative to --maintenance-window-end.
  • Added --maintenance-window-duration flag to gcloud container clusters update command as an alternative to --maintenance-window-end.
entry.summary: You can now specify the duration of maintenance windows when creating or updating Kubernetes clusters. This provides more flexibility in managing cluster maintenance schedules.
entry.title: Kubernetes Engine: New flag for maintenance windows

entry.content: • Promoted gcloud network-connectivity spokes gateways advertised-routes command group to GA, including create, delete, describe, and list commands.
entry.summary: The `gcloud network-connectivity spokes gateways advertised-routes` command group, including create, delete, describe, and list commands, has been promoted to General Availability. This release enhances network connectivity management capabilities.
entry.title: Network Connectivity: Network Connectivity GA Commands Released

entry.content: • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints commands (create, delete, describe, list, update) to GA.
entry.summary: The `gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints` commands, including create, delete, describe, list, and update, have been promoted to General Availability. This enhancement improves project scoping for managing firewall endpoints.
entry.title: Network Security: Firewall Endpoint Commands Reach General Availability

entry.summary: We've expanded Security Command Center's capabilities by adding the 'external-exposure' service. This enhancement allows for more comprehensive security monitoring and threat detection within your environment.
entry.title: Security Command Center: New Security Detection Available

entry.content: • Updated import and export schemas for gcloud service-extensions authz-extensions.
entry.summary: We have updated the import and export schemas for `gcloud service-extensions authz-extensions`. These changes ensure better compatibility and flexibility when managing authorization extensions.
entry.title: Service Extensions: Service Extensions schema updates

entry.content:
• Added --image-family flag to gcloud workbench instances upgrade.
  • Added NVIDIA_RTX6000 to --accelerator-type choices on gcloud workbench instances create and update.

Subscribe to these release notes at https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/google-cloud-sdk-announce.
entry.summary: The latest Workbench release introduces an --image-family flag for instance upgrades and expands accelerator options to include NVIDIA_RTX6000 for instance creation and updates. Stay informed about future updates by subscribing to our release notes.
entry.title: Workbench: Workbench Instance Enhancements
